releaseNotes:
• New: Multi-view — watch 1×2 (side-by-side) or 2×2 (quad grid) live streams simultaneously. Enable in Settings → Multi-view layout, then tap the grid icon in the channel list toolbar.
• New: Each multi-view cell independently plays, mutes, and reconnects. Tap a cell to give it audio focus. Double-tap to promote it to full-screen. Tap + to assign a channel to an empty cell.
• New: Cell assignments persist across exits — the last channels you picked for each layout are restored on re-entry.
• New: Multi-view cells use reduced buffers (32 MB each) and software decoding to avoid hardware surface conflicts on Android TV.
• New: Channel picker for multi-view is a lightweight search screen — no modification to the main channel list.
